sub_fields.label: Background Color
sub_fields.name: background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Section background. "Default" uses the page’s cream background.

sub_fields.label: Left Side
sub_fields.name: left_type
sub_fields.instructions: What the left column shows.

sub_fields.label: Left Image
sub_fields.name: left_image
sub_fields.instructions: Shown when the left column type is Image. Displayed as a square crop.

sub_fields.label: Left Text
sub_fields.name: left_text
sub_fields.instructions: Shown when the left column type is Text. Use Heading 2 for the section title.

sub_fields.label: Right Side
sub_fields.name: right_type
sub_fields.instructions: What the right column shows.

sub_fields.label: Right Image
sub_fields.name: right_image
sub_fields.instructions: Shown when the right column type is Image. Displayed as a square crop.

sub_fields.label: Right Text
sub_fields.name: right_text
sub_fields.instructions: Shown when the right column type is Text. Use Heading 2 for the section title.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small script-style label shown above the text side.

sub_fields.label: CTA Button
sub_fields.name: cta
sub_fields.instructions: Optional button shown below the text side.

sub_fields.label: Stats
sub_fields.name: stats
sub_fields.instructions: Optional stat row shown below the text side, e.g. "5 / Box sizes".

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.name: label
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "Box sizes".

sub_fields.label: Badge Text
sub_fields.name: badge_text
sub_fields.instructions: Small pill above the heading. Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Plain text. The word "sweet" is styled with a decorative pink underline in the template — keep it in the heading if you want that flourish to show.
sub_fields.default_value: Gifting made sweet, one box at a time.

sub_fields.label: Subtext
sub_fields.name: subtext
sub_fields.instructions: One or two short sentences under the heading.
sub_fields.default_value: Beautifully packed snack boxes, chocolate bouquets and custom hampers — ready to order in minutes and delivered with care across Mutare.

sub_fields.label: Primary CTA
sub_fields.name: primary_cta
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "Shop Snack Boxes" → Shop page.

sub_fields.label: Secondary CTA
sub_fields.name: secondary_cta
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "Our Story" → About page.

sub_fields.label: Trust Line
sub_fields.name: trust_line
sub_fields.instructions: Reassurance line under the buttons, e.g. "Trusted local business". Leave empty to hide.
sub_fields.default_value: Trusted local business · packed fresh to order

sub_fields.label: Collage Images
sub_fields.name: collage_images
sub_fields.instructions: 2 photos shown floating around the hero on desktop.

sub_fields.label: Price Badge Text
sub_fields.name: price_badge_text
sub_fields.instructions: Small circular sticker overlapping the 4th collage photo, e.g. "$5+". Leave blank to hide it.

sub_fields.label: Items
sub_fields.name: items
sub_fields.instructions: Shown as a single row on desktop — 4 indicators fit best.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: An emoji works well here.

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.name: label
sub_fields.instructions: Short indicator text, e.g. "Free CBD delivery".

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Subtext
sub_fields.name: subtext
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Product Limit
sub_fields.name: product_limit
sub_fields.instructions: How many featured products to show. Defaults to 4.

sub_fields.label: View All Link
sub_fields.name: view_all_link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional — leave blank to hide.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Subtext
sub_fields.name: subtext
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Categories
sub_fields.name: featured_categories
sub_fields.instructions: Pick which categories show as tiles. Only categories with at least one product are selectable. Leave empty to automatically show every category that currently has products.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Subtext
sub_fields.name: subtext
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Products
sub_fields.name: products
sub_fields.instructions: Pick the products to showcase in this section.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Items
sub_fields.name: items
sub_fields.instructions: Displayed as a card grid — up to 6.

sub_fields.label: Quote
sub_fields.name: quote
sub_fields.instructions: PLACEHOLDER CONTENT — mockup quote from the design file, not a real customer review. Replace with a real testimonial before/after launch.

sub_fields.label: Name
sub_fields.name: name
sub_fields.instructions: PLACEHOLDER CONTENT — not a real customer name.

sub_fields.label: Stars
sub_fields.name: stars
sub_fields.instructions: 1–5. Defaults to 5 when empty.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Gallery
sub_fields.name: gallery
sub_fields.instructions: Manually curated photos — not a live Instagram feed.

sub_fields.label: Link Text
sub_fields.name: link_text
sub_fields.instructions: Links out to the profile URL set below in Theme Settings → Header → Socials, for whichever platform is chosen.

sub_fields.label: Link Platform
sub_fields.name: platform
sub_fields.instructions: Which Theme Settings → Socials URL the header link/button points to.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.
sub_fields.default_value: Order your gift box on WhatsApp

sub_fields.label: Subtext
sub_fields.name: subtext
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.
sub_fields.default_value: Message us on WhatsApp for gifting ideas, quick ordering and friendly help along the way.

sub_fields.label: Button Text
sub_fields.name: button_text
sub_fields.instructions: Links to the WhatsApp number set in Theme Settings → Header → Socials → WhatsApp.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Background Color
sub_fields.name: background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Section background. "Default" uses the page’s cream background.

sub_fields.label: Style
sub_fields.name: style
sub_fields.instructions: Icon: plain icon-circle grid, no card. Numbered: auto-numbered steps in white rounded cards.

sub_fields.label: Items
sub_fields.name: items
sub_fields.instructions: One card per feature/step — up to 6.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: An emoji works well here. Only shown when Style is Icon.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Short card title.

sub_fields.label: Subtext
sub_fields.name: subtext
sub_fields.instructions: One or two short sentences.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Required — the block doesn’t render without it.

sub_fields.label: Subtext
sub_fields.name: subtext
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Button
sub_fields.name: button
sub_fields.instructions: Required — the block doesn’t render without a button URL.

sub_fields.label: Delivery Text
sub_fields.name: delivery_text
sub_fields.instructions: Shown in the "Delivery" card.

sub_fields.label: WPForms Form ID
sub_fields.name: form_id
sub_fields.instructions: The WPForms form to embed (see Contact Form entry in WPForms admin for the ID).

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Question
sub_fields.name: question
sub_fields.instructions: Shown as the clickable accordion row.

sub_fields.label: Answer
sub_fields.name: answer
sub_fields.instructions: Plain text, shown when expanded. The first item starts expanded.

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: Long-form copy — used for prose pages like the Privacy and Refund policies. Use Heading 2 for section titles and Heading 3 beneath them; the page title is added automatically, so do not repeat it here.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Intro
sub_fields.name: intro
sub_fields.instructions: Optional short paragraph shown under the heading. Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Background Color
sub_fields.name: background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Section background. "Default" uses the page’s cream background.

sub_fields.label: Background Image
sub_fields.name: background_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. When set, this replaces the flat Background Color with a photo behind a brand-gradient overlay (same treatment as the page banner) — heading/intro switch to white automatically.

sub_fields.label: Items
sub_fields.name: items
sub_fields.instructions: One card per step/topic — each holds a full paragraph, unlike Feature Grid's one-line subtext.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: An emoji works well here.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Short card title.

sub_fields.label: Text
sub_fields.name: text
sub_fields.instructions: Plain text paragraph.
